# Load Packages

```{r}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(car)
library(heplots)
library(MVN)
library(biotools)
library(ggplot2)
library(GGally)
```

# Load Data

```{r}
file_path <- "C:/Users/William/Desktop/R code - Survey ops/Data for G10 Analysis.xlsx"

obj16 <- read_excel(file_path, sheet = "obj16")

names(obj16)
```

# Prepare Data

```{r}
g10_data <- obj16 %>%
  dplyr::select(
    Health_Deficit_Z,
    LeisureSocial_Deficit_Z,
    Household_Deficit_Z,
    Productivity_Deficit_Z,
    a1, a2, a3, b1, b3_count, g1, g2, g4, g6,
    FA1, FA2, FA3, FA4, FA5, FA6
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    b3_count = ifelse(b3_count == 9999, 0, b3_count),
    a2 = factor(a2),
    a3 = factor(a3),
    b1 = factor(b1),
    g1 = factor(g1),
    g2 = factor(g2),
    g4 = factor(g4),
    g6 = factor(g6)
  )

g10_complete <- na.omit(g10_data)

nrow(g10_complete)
```

# Fit Model

```{r}
model <- lm(
  cbind(
    Health_Deficit_Z,
    LeisureSocial_Deficit_Z,
    Household_Deficit_Z,
    Productivity_Deficit_Z
  ) ~ a1 + a2 + a3 + b1 + b3_count + g1 + g2 + g4 + g6 +
    FA1 + FA2 + FA3 + FA4 + FA5 + FA6,
  data = g10_complete
)

summary(model)
```

# MANOVA Results

```{r}
manova_model <- manova(model)

summary(manova_model, test = "Pillai")
summary(manova_model, test = "Wilks")
summary(manova_model, test = "Hotelling-Lawley")
summary(manova_model, test = "Roy")
```

# Univariate ANOVA Results

```{r}
summary.aov(manova_model)
```

# Multicollinearity Test

```{r}
vif_model <- lm(
  Health_Deficit_Z ~ a1 + a2 + a3 + b1 + b3_count + g1 + g2 + g4 + g6 +
    FA1 + FA2 + FA3 + FA4 + FA5 + FA6,
  data = g10_complete
)

vif_result <- vif(vif_model)
vif_table <- as.data.frame(vif_result)

if ("GVIF" %in% names(vif_table)) {
  vif_table$Adjusted_GVIF <- vif_table$GVIF^(1 / (2 * vif_table$Df))
}

vif_table
```

# VIF Plot

```{r}
vif_plot_data <- vif_table
vif_plot_data$Variable <- rownames(vif_plot_data)

ggplot(vif_plot_data, aes(x = reorder(Variable, Adjusted_GVIF), y = Adjusted_GVIF)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Adjusted GVIF", x = "Variable", y = "Adjusted GVIF")
```

# Residuals

```{r}
resids <- as.data.frame(residuals(model))

head(resids)
```

# Normality Tests

```{r}
mvn_result <- MVN::mvn(data = resids)

mvn_result$multivariate_normality
mvn_result$univariate_normality
mvn_result$descriptives
```

# Q-Q Plots

```{r}
par(mfrow = c(2, 2))

qqnorm(resids$Health_Deficit_Z, main = "Health Deficit")
qqline(resids$Health_Deficit_Z)

qqnorm(resids$LeisureSocial_Deficit_Z, main = "Leisure/Social Deficit")
qqline(resids$LeisureSocial_Deficit_Z)

qqnorm(resids$Household_Deficit_Z, main = "Household Deficit")
qqline(resids$Household_Deficit_Z)

qqnorm(resids$Productivity_Deficit_Z, main = "Productivity Deficit")
qqline(resids$Productivity_Deficit_Z)

par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
```

# Histograms

```{r}
hist(resids$Health_Deficit_Z, main = "Health Deficit Residuals", xlab = "Residuals")
hist(resids$LeisureSocial_Deficit_Z, main = "Leisure/Social Deficit Residuals", xlab = "Residuals")
hist(resids$Household_Deficit_Z, main = "Household Deficit Residuals", xlab = "Residuals")
hist(resids$Productivity_Deficit_Z, main = "Productivity Deficit Residuals", xlab = "Residuals")
```

# Residual Boxplots

```{r}
boxplot(
  resids$Health_Deficit_Z,
  resids$LeisureSocial_Deficit_Z,
  resids$Household_Deficit_Z,
  resids$Productivity_Deficit_Z,
  names = c("Health", "Leisure/Social", "Household", "Productivity"),
  main = "Boxplots of Residuals",
  ylab = "Residuals"
)
```

# Box's M Test

```{r}
Y_boxm <- as.matrix(
  g10_complete %>%
    dplyr::select(
      Health_Deficit_Z,
      LeisureSocial_Deficit_Z,
      Household_Deficit_Z,
      Productivity_Deficit_Z
    )
)

group_boxm <- droplevels(g10_complete$a2)

boxm_result <- biotools::boxM(Y_boxm, group_boxm)

boxm_result
```

# Mahalanobis Outlier Check

```{r}
mahal <- mahalanobis(
  resids,
  colMeans(resids),
  cov(resids)
)

mahal_cutoff <- qchisq(0.999, df = 4)
outliers <- which(mahal > mahal_cutoff)

outlier_summary <- data.frame(
  cutoff = mahal_cutoff,
  number_of_outliers = length(outliers),
  percent_outliers = length(outliers) / nrow(g10_complete) * 100,
  max_mahalanobis = max(mahal),
  mean_mahalanobis = mean(mahal)
)

outlier_summary
outliers
```

# Mahalanobis Plot

```{r}
plot(mahal, main = "Mahalanobis Distance", ylab = "Distance", xlab = "Observation")
abline(h = mahal_cutoff, lty = 2)
```

# Residuals vs Fitted

```{r}
fitted_values <- as.data.frame(fitted(model))

par(mfrow = c(2, 2))

plot(fitted_values$Health_Deficit_Z, resids$Health_Deficit_Z,
     main = "Health", xlab = "Fitted", ylab = "Residuals")
abline(h = 0, lty = 2)

plot(fitted_values$LeisureSocial_Deficit_Z, resids$LeisureSocial_Deficit_Z,
     main = "Leisure/Social", xlab = "Fitted", ylab = "Residuals")
abline(h = 0, lty = 2)

plot(fitted_values$Household_Deficit_Z, resids$Household_Deficit_Z,
     main = "Household", xlab = "Fitted", ylab = "Residuals")
abline(h = 0, lty = 2)

plot(fitted_values$Productivity_Deficit_Z, resids$Productivity_Deficit_Z,
     main = "Productivity", xlab = "Fitted", ylab = "Residuals")
abline(h = 0, lty = 2)

par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
```

# Pairwise Outcome Plot

```{r}
GGally::ggpairs(
  g10_complete %>%
    dplyr::select(
      Health_Deficit_Z,
      LeisureSocial_Deficit_Z,
      Household_Deficit_Z,
      Productivity_Deficit_Z
    )
)
```
